# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

ER=0;TEST_TIMER_INDEX=1;CONFIG_TIMER_MAX_NUM=4;CONFIG_TIMER_MAX_TIMERS_NUM=8;CONFIG_TIMER_CLOCK_VALUE=32000000;CONFIG_TIMER_0_WIDTH_64=0;;;;;;;;CONFIG_DMA_SUPPORT_LLI;CONFIG_DMA_SUPPORT_SMDMA;;;CONFIG_RTC_USING_V100;CONFIG_RTC_MAX_NUM=5;CONFIG_RTC_MAX_RTCS_NUM=16;CONFIG_RTC_CLOCK_VALUE=32768;;;SUPPORT_CLOCKS;SUPPORT_CLOCKS_CORE;SUPPORT_CLOCKS;;;;;;;;;;;SUPPORT_AT_CMD;;;SUPPORT_CONNECTIVITY;;SUPPORT_CPU_UTILS;;;;;;;SUPPORT_DFX_PANIC;SUPPORT_DFX_PANIC;SUPPORT_DFX_PANIC;SUPPORT_DFX_PRESERVE;SUPPORT_DFX_LOG;CONFIG_FS_FAT;CONFIG_FS_VFS;CONFIG_FS_FAT_CACHE;CONFIG_FS_VFS;CONFIG_FS_FAT_CACHE;CONFIG_DRIVER_DISK;CONFIG_FS_YAFFS;;;;;;;;;;;;;;MBEDTLS_NO_PLATFORM_ENTROPY;MBEDTLS_ENTROPY_HARDWARE_ALT
